step.title: Check Trello integration
step.action: Read _symphony/_config/global.yaml and verify Trello integration is enabled.
Confirm board URL is configured and accessible.

step.title: Connect and load board state
step.action: Connect to Trello API and load the full board state including lists, cards, and labels.
Cache the current board snapshot for conflict detection.

step.title: Map workflow states to card statuses
step.action: Map Symphony workflow states (pending, active, complete, blocked) to Trello card statuses.
Map Symphony lifecycle phases to Trello lists.

step.title: Sync status bidirectionally
step.action: Update Trello cards from Symphony: move cards whose Symphony state has changed since last sync.
Update Symphony from Trello: apply card moves made directly on the Trello board.

step.title: Detect and report conflicts
step.action: Identify cards where Symphony state and Trello state diverged since last sync.
Flag conflicts for manual resolution and record resolution decisions.

step.title: Produce sync report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with sync details.
